data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for opt-out handling with an audit trail. However, the evidence does not provide any concrete information or endpoints that demonstrate how opt-out requests are processed or how an audit trail is maintained. The linked use case discusses consent changes being timestamped and auditable, but it does not explicitly confirm the handling of opt-out requests, indicating a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: Lack of evidence for opt-out handling and audit trail mechanisms.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract for opt-out handling
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the opt-out handling and audit trail.
